taxonomy: Sarcanthus koeteiensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the genus Sarcanthus, a group of orchids native to tropical regions. Within the orchid family, Sarcanthus koeteiensis is further classified as a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae. This subfamily is one of the largest and most diverse groups within the orchid family, comprising over 20,000 species. Sarcanthus koeteiensis is a relatively rare species, and its classification reflects its unique position within the orchid family's vast and complex taxonomy.
